ID

The layer ID. This is a unique ID for the layer, and is used to identify the layer in a number of method calls.

virtual int ID { get; set; }

Returns

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

LayerResultOptions

Indicate whether to include and/or modify Geometry.

virtual ILayerResultOptions LayerResultOptions { get; set; }

Returns

ILayerResultOptions

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<P>Use&nbsp;<A href="javascript:Jump('esriCarto/LayerResultOptions.htm')"><STRONG>LayerResultOptions</STRONG></A>&nbsp;when you want to customize the results of a MapServer query - for example, when you want field names (instead of field aliases)&nbsp;or data in native format or in some cases you may want to&nbsp;limit or adjust the geometry being returned.</P> <P>Since&nbsp;LayerResultsOptions&nbsp;is part of of the LayerDescription any settings made for LayerResultsOptions will only affect those methods&nbsp;that include&nbsp;the LayerDescription (or MapDescription whcih contains LayerDescriptions)&nbsp;as a parameter. These include <A href="javascript:Jump('esriCarto/IMapServer2_Find.htm')"><STRONG>Find</STRONG></A>, <A href="javascript:Jump('esriCarto/IMapServer2_Identify.htm')"><STRONG>Identify</STRONG></A>, <STRONG><A href="javascript:Jump('esriCarto/IMapServer3_QueryData.htm')">QueryData</A></STRONG>,&nbsp;<STRONG><A href="javascript:Jump('esriCarto/IMapServer3_QueryRowIDs.htm')">QueryRowIDs</A></STRONG>, <STRONG><A href="javascript:Jump('esriCarto/IMapServer3_QueryRowCount.htm')">QueryRowCount</A></STRONG>,&nbsp;<A href="javascript:Jump('esriCarto/IMapServer2_QueryFeatureCount2.htm')"><STRONG>QueryFeatureCount2</STRONG></A>, <A href="javascript:Jump('esriCarto/IMapServer_QueryFeatureIDs2.htm')"><STRONG>QueryFeatureIDs2</STRONG></A>,&nbsp;<A href="javascript:Jump('esriCarto/IMapServer2_QueryFeatureData2.htm')"><STRONG>QueryFeatureData2</STRONG></A> and <A href="javascript:Jump('esriCarto/IMapServer_QueryHyperlinks.htm')"><STRONG>QueryHyperlinks</STRONG></A>. QueryHyperLinks always returns geometry regardless InlcudeGeometry’s value, but honors GeometryResultOptions.</P>

SelectionBufferDistance

The selection buffer distance. When drawing, and if a selection filter is specified, a buffer zone of the specified distance will be displayed around the selected features.

virtual double SelectionBufferDistance { get; set; }

Returns

double

Draw the data cumulatively from the first instance of time in data as time progresses.

Draw time offset to overlay the data on a earlier or later time span.
